name: ai-assistant
summary: Streaming LLM chat. The model key lives in a Supabase Edge Function (never in the app); message history is RLS-scoped. Key-free dev via a mock stream.
postInstall: Deploy the Edge Function: supabase functions deploy ai-chat
Set the model key as a SERVER secret (never EXPO_PUBLIC): supabase secrets set OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
Without OPENAI_API_KEY the function streams a canned mock reply, so dev works key-free.
Streaming uses fetch from 'expo/fetch' (Expo SDK 52+). No extra dep.
Replace src/features/assistant/ui/assistant-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
